name: Oatmeal Sesame Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter.
2. Stir in the sugar and vanilla and cook until bubbly.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients. Mix well.
4. Pour into a greased 12x8 inch pan.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven for 7-10 minutes or until golden brown.
6. When cool, cut into pieces of desired size.
